zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Baird II Auchmeddon於1475年出生在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾皮布萊斯時，他的父親Gilbert Baird15歲，母親Janet Ray Posso20歲。他於1517年之前與Elizabeth Bessy Learmonth在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1543年2月10日在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪享年68歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾劍橋大學默里 阿爾度爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew Baird II Auchmeddon于1475年出生在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾皮布萊斯时，他的父亲Gilbert Baird15岁，母亲Janet Ray Posso20岁。他于1517年之前与Elizabeth Bessy Learmonth在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1543年2月10日在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪享年68岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾劍橋大學默里 阿爾度爾。

nameMeanings.name: Baird
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from a common pronunciation of   Bard   in Scotland.
occupational name from Gaelic bàrd ‘bard, poet, minstrel’, or of Gaelic Mac an Baird ‘son of the bard’.

variants.name: Bard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Michel, Aime, Alphonse, Alphy, Armand, Cecile, Celestine, Emile, Fernand, Germaine, Gilles, Jacques.

English (of Norman origin) and French: from the Old French personal name Bard(e), ancient Germanic Bardo, from barta ‘battle axe’. This was borne as a surname by a prominent Norman family with lands in west Normandy and in various English and Scottish counties, including Essex, Hertfordshire, North Yorkshire, Northumberland, and Lanarkshire. In Scotland the original family were Norman landowners in Strathaven parish in Lanarkshire. They were descended from the Baards, lords of Loftus in the North Yorkshire, descendants of the mid 12th-century Richard Baart.
Irish: altered form of either   Beard   or   Baird  .

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Baird II Auchmeddon was born in 1475, in Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Gilbert Baird, was 15 and his mother, Janet Ray Posso, was 20. He married Elizabeth Bessy Learmonth before 1517, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 10 February 1543, in Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in New Aberdour, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew Baird II Auchmeddon est né en 1475, à Peebles, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert Baird, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Janet Ray Posso, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Bessy Learmonth avant 1517, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 10 février 1543, à Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à New Aberdour, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat vor 1517 in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Elizabeth Bessy Learmonth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 10. Februar 1543 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in New Aberdour, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Baird II Auchmeddon è nato il nel 1475 nel Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gilbert Baird, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Janet Ray Posso, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Bessy Learmonth prima del 1517, nel Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.lifeSummary: Andrew Baird II Auchmeddonが1475年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアペエブレスで生まれた時，父Gilbert Bairdは15歳，母Janet Ray Possoは20歳であった。1517年以前にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアでElizabeth Bessy Learmonthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1543年2月10日にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアアバーディーンで68歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアニュー アバードウルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Baird II Auchmeddon(이)가 1475년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르 피블레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Baird(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Ray Posso(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1517년 이전 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에서 Elizabeth Bessy Learmonth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1543년 2월 10일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 압르디에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 뉴 압르다어에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Bessy Learmonth antes 1517, em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Baird II Auchmeddon родился в 1475 г. в местности пиблесь, пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gilbert Baird было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Ray Posso, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Bessy Learmonth перед 1517 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 10 февраля 1543 г. в местности абирдин, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности ню абирдоур, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
